name: Midway accident
short_description: This is a multi-person survival and escape game. You need to find what you need in the game. You can choose to leave immediately after finding what you need, or explore what happened in this area.
detailed_description:
How should you escape safely when you have an accident on the way? You need to find what you need in the game and get out of here.
This is a hardcore survival and escape game.

Main gameplay of the game

The gameplay of this game is mainly to find items and then escape.
There will also be various monsters in the game to stop you from looking for these items.

Game Features

Players need to survive and escape in places where food and various materials are limited.
And you need to always pay attention to the dangers on the map.

Open backpack system


Players are free to carry items and match equipment.

Realistic medical system



If you are injured, you can't recover your blood quickly. You need to use items such as medical kits to recover.
There is also a bleeding system in the game. Once the player doesn't stop bleeding, he will die of blood loss.
There are also painkillers in the game, which can reduce the pain and ambiguity caused by the attack.
We will make him more realistic in the future, which is one of our main goals.

Mobile phone system


There are many practical softwares (chat and navigation) in the mobile phone in the game, which can make it easier for players to better pass the game.
And more functions will be added in the future.

A variety of monsters

Every map has its own different monsters.
Each monster has its own special effects, and players need to understand these monsters and react.

The story of the map

You can choose to leave immediately after finding what you need, or explore what happened in this area.

The game supports 1~4 players to cooperate.

supported_languages: English, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
